body.content: Team — flagging CL-108300 as canonical for the retirement handoff. Everything about this file follows the panel-cause playbook to the letter. Sarah, please shadow me on the close-out call today.
@Mike quick question — CL-108321 came in as panel-cause but marshal broke it out as wiring on Day 8. Reserve just went up 37%. That's the wiring exception in the playbook, right?
Textbook. Expect 30-40% upward on wiring reclassifications. Preserve the wiring anyway — evidence chain is still valuable even without recall.
Just closed the Q2 review on Mike's book. Reserve accuracy within 8% on 27 of 30 files. That's the discipline we want to codify in the playbook before April.
Retirement countdown: 34 days. Sarah, tomorrow we walk through the 3 hard exception cases together. The wiring reclass, the unrelated-prior, and the no-4A recall path.
